{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Also known as the Easter Island statues. The residents there received help from a Snail to build those statues and gave this Snail Shell as a git to show their gratitude.
|affct=FTH
|hard=HP
|source=Divine Neutral Chest (0.8%)
|color=green
|earth=2
|water=1
|fire=1
|wind=2
|form=Angel
|element=Water
|realm=Yamato
|orangehard=DEF
}}
